questions.question: Describe the primary function of the Transport Layer in a computer network. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of the Transport Layer

questions.question: What is the main difference between a Connection-Oriented (CO) and Connectionless (CL) transport protocol? Provide an example of each. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Compare and contrast CO and CL protocols

questions.question: Explain the concept of segmentation and reassembly in the context of Transport Layer protocols. How do these processes contribute to improving network efficiency? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the segmentation and reassembly process
